caption: A wide shot captures a vast, modern hall filled with a large crowd of people seated in tiered rows. The room features a high, intricately patterned ceiling with integrated lighting and a large, light-blue textured wall at the front, which contains a central podium and a circular emblem. Two large screens flank the central wall, displaying a live feed of the event. The attendees are dressed in a mix of casual and formal attire, including white shirts and various colorful clothing. Throughout the sequence, the crowd remains largely stationary, though subtle movements are visible as individuals shift in their seats. The lighting and camera angle remain consistent across the scene, maintaining a steady view of the assembly gathered in the expansive, architecturally distinct space.
